titleStmt.title: SII 26.141: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 141. (A.R. No. 133 of 1909.) KOMARALIṄGAM, UDUMALAIPET TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west wall of the Karivaradarāja-perumāḷ temple.

This inscription, which is slightly damaged, records the order of the king addressed to the Śrīvaishṇavas and the person in charge of Śrīkārya of the temple of Kariyapirāṉ in Kumaraṅgabhīmach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Karaivaḻi-nāḍu granting lands in a number of chaturvēdimaṅgalas (names specified) together with elavai, ugavai, etc., excluding kaḍamai, as puravūrt-tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam, evidently to the god Kariyapirāṉ. Agaram Adhirādhirādhich-chaturvēdimaṅgalam is also mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakravatti koṉerimaiykoṇṭāṉ karaivaḻināṭṭu kumaraṅkavimaccaturvvedimaṅkalattu kariyapirān tirumuṟṟattu śrī vaiṣṇavarkaḷukkum śrīkāriyam ceyvāṉukkum nam Olai kuṭuttapaṭiyāvatu Ivvemperumāṉ tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam liṟaiyiliyā
yirukiṟa ni caytacoḻaccaturvvedimaṅkalattilum ceyaṅ koṇṭacoḻanallūrilum nilam Iraṇṭu māvum viraṉārāyaṇaccaturvvedi maṅkalattilum coḻacūlāmaṇinallūrilum nilam Iraṇṭumākkāṇiyum Akaram trailokkiyavallicca
ruppetimaṅka jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻaccaturvvedimaṅkalattilum kāraippaṭṭilum nilam Oru māvum Ucitavillavaccaturvedimaṅkalattilum Amarapuyaṅkaranallūrilum ṉilam Oru māvum coḻakulamāṇikkaccaturvvedi maṅkalattilum
māṉūri caturvvetimaṅkalattilum virakeraḷanallūrilum nilam Orumāvaraiyum Āka nilam pattu mākkāṇiyum puṟavūrttiruviṭaiyāṭṭamenṟu kaṭamai tavira Elavai Ukavai Uḷḷiṭṭa Antarāyaṅkaḷum koṇṭu vantamai
yil In l kalveṭṭinapaṭi Iṟātey kaṭamaiyum Elavai Ukavaiyum vakanmikaḷ perum ntap peṟumnaṅ kalyāṇappaṭi nellum ponṉum ṉam Eḻuccikkuṭiyeccoṟum Ūr viniyokaṅkaḷum Iṟaiyili nellum nimantap ponṉu
Iṟṟiṟu E rātomāka patineḻāvatu Uttara Ayanattin ṉāḷ namakku naṉṟāka Udakapūrvvam tāṉam paṇṇik kuṭuttamaiyil Innilam pattumākkāṇiyum Akaram Atirādhirādhiccaturvvedimaṅkalattu pināl Iṟaiiliyāy varukiṟa nilam mukkāṇiyum I
nnilam ma koḷḷātomāka Iṟaiyili maṅkala ṟāvaru paṭi cantrādittavaṟ celvatāka cempilum cilaiyilum veṭṭikkoḷḷappeṟuvārkaḷāka yāṇṭu patineḻāvatu nam Olai kuṭuttom .
Digital edition of SII 26.141 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
